response.justification: Bogdan brings highly relevant, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligning with the core AI-driven nature of the role. He has a demonstrated history of Staff-level technical strategy, high-throughput distributed systems experience, and strong TypeScript skills. However, his complete lack of Python experience—a stated must-have—is a notable gap that will need to be evaluated during the interview process.
strengths: Direct experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
Strong background in high-throughput distributed systems, previously handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated Staff-level technical leadership and deep commitment to software craftsmanship.
concerns: Complete lack of Python experience, which is listed as a must-have technical skill.
Does not explicitly detail out-of-hours on-call rotation experience or incident response capability.
Participation in structured Agile ceremonies (like rotating scrum champion) is not explicitly mentioned.
